per_turn_leaks.student_message: So no perspiration at all during the episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, yes, I do get some sweating when I'm experiencing difficulty breathing and wheezing, but it's not just night sweats. It's more of a general feeling of being hot and clammy under my arms and on my palms, which can be really uncomfortable.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Specifically, has anyone in your family had serious diseases?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My maternal grandmother actually passed away from lung cancer, which is a bit concerning for me given some of the symptoms I've been experiencing. But other than that, I don't know of any significant medical problems in my immediate or extended family.
